summary: Iteration 52 - French Key Harmonization Testing. All 9 backend API tests passed (100%). All API response keys have been successfully renamed from English to French. Frontend pages (Dashboard, ParcelsVerificationPage, MembersPage, SSRTEAgentDashboard) correctly read and display the French keys. Route collision between ssrte.py and ssrte_analytics.py has been fixed.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/cooperative/dashboard returns French keys: parcelles.superficie_totale, parcelles.score_carbone_moyen, parcelles.co2_total
GET /api/cooperative/parcels/all returns French keys: nom_producteur, superficie, type_culture, score_carbone, statut_verification, compteurs_statut
GET /api/ssrte/visits returns French keys: nom_membre, date_visite, niveau_risque, enfants_observes, taille_menage
GET /api/cooperative/members returns French keys: nombre_parcelles, superficie_totale, score_carbone_moyen
Route collision fix verified: /api/ssrte/analytics/visits works correctly (moved from /api/ssrte/visits in ssrte_analytics.py)
GET /api/ssrte/visits (main route in ssrte.py) still works correctly
GET /api/cooperative/members/{id}/parcels returns French keys: membre_id, nom_membre, total_parcelles, superficie_totale, co2_total, score_carbone_moyen
GET /api/cooperative/parcels/{id}/details returns French keys: localisation, superficie, type_culture, score_carbone, co2_capture, statut_verification, coordonnees_gps, conforme_eudr
Frontend cooperative dashboard displays parcels data correctly with French labels
Frontend ParcelsVerificationPage reads nom_producteur, superficie, type_culture, score_carbone correctly
Frontend MembersPage reads nombre_parcelles, superficie_totale, score_carbone_moyen correctly
Frontend SSRTEAgentDashboard reads nom_membre, date_visite, niveau_risque, enfants_observes from visits correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 4 pages tested render correctly with French keys)

context_for_next_testing_agent: French key harmonization is complete. All API endpoints return French keys (superficie_totale, score_carbone_moyen, nom_producteur, etc.) instead of English keys (total_hectares, average_carbon_score, farmer_name, etc.). Frontend pages correctly read these French keys. Route collision between ssrte.py and ssrte_analytics.py has been fixed by moving analytics visits to /api/ssrte/analytics/visits.
